data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Export for compliance audits'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for exporting compliance audits, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an export feature, yet there is no supporting evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is implemented or operational. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of the export functionality for compliance audits.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add export functionality check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that compliance audits can be exported successfully.
